# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: my-compute-instance
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot-disk
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: global/networks/default
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

  - name: my-cloud-sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instances
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
      settings:
        tier: db-f1-micro
        ipConfiguration:
          ipv4Enabled: true

  - name: my-cloud-storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: my-app-bucket
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD

  - name: my-load-balancer
    type: compute.v1.globalAddress
    properties:
      name: my-load-balancer-ip
      addressType: EXTERNAL
      purpose: NONE

  - name: my-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      name: my-backend-service
      backend:
        - group: $(ref.my-compute-instance.instanceGroup)
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.my-health-check.selfLink)
      portName: http
      protocol: HTTP

  - name: my-health-check
    type: compute.v1.healthCheck
    properties:
      name: my-health-check
      type: HTTP
      requestPath: /
      checkIntervalSec: 10
      timeoutSec: 5
      healthyThreshold: 2
      unhealthyThreshold: 2

  - name: my-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      name: my-url-map
      defaultService: $(ref.my-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: my-target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      name: my-target-http-proxy
      urlMap: $(ref.my-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: my-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      name: my-forwarding-rule
      target: $(ref.my-target-http-proxy.selfLink)
      portRange: 80
      IPAddress: $(ref.my-load-balancer.address)
